title: BlackRock Says Crypto Can Outrun the Quantum Threat — If It Moves Fast Enough
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

BlackRock Says Crypto Can Outrun the Quantum Threat — If It Moves Fast Enough

BlackRock thinks Bitcoin and other crypto networks have the upper hand when facing the threat of quantum computers.

This post BlackRock Says Crypto Can Outrun the Quantum Threat — If It Moves Fast Enough first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Mathew Di Salvo.

title: Goldman Sachs Backs the Clarity Act, Splitting Wall Street Over Crypto Rules
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Goldman Sachs Backs the Clarity Act, Splitting Wall Street Over Crypto Rules

Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon endorsed the Clarity Act, breaking with much of the banking industry as Senate Republicans push the crypto market-structure bill despite mounting opposition over stablecoin yield provisions and ethics concerns.

This post Goldman Sachs Backs the Clarity Act, Splitting Wall Street Over Crypto Rules first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Coinbase Builds Post-Quantum Custody System, Funds Bitcoin’s Crypto Upgrade
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Coinbase Builds Post-Quantum Custody System, Funds Bitcoin’s Crypto Upgrade

Coinbase says that while the threat isn't imminent, quantum may one day be able to break Bitcoin's cryptography.

This post Coinbase Builds Post-Quantum Custody System, Funds Bitcoin’s Crypto Upgrade first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Mathew Di Salvo.

title: Kazakhstan Moves to Build a National Crypto Reserve Funded by Bitcoin Miners
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Kazakhstan Moves to Build a National Crypto Reserve Funded by Bitcoin Miners

Kazakhstan has laid out a plan to build a national strategic crypto reserve fed by its bitcoin miners, part of a two-step push by President Kassym-Jomart Tokayev to pull the country’s large mining industry into a regulated, state-supervised system. A presidential decree signed July 7 sets the frame, and a government resolution approved July 18 […]

This post Kazakhstan Moves to Build a National Crypto Reserve Funded by Bitcoin Miners first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: BlackRock, Coinbase, Strategy Among Nine Firms Launching the Bitcoin Security Consortium, Pledging $15 Million To BTC Security Development
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

BlackRock, Coinbase, Strategy Among Nine Firms Launching the Bitcoin Security Consortium, Pledging $15 Million To BTC Security Development

Nine major Bitcoin firms launched a consortium pledging $15 million to support Bitcoin security research and long-term resilience, including quantum readiness.
